narrative: Suspected stealth intervention triggers a sharp 0.5% drop in USD/JPY to 161.210 ahead of US Nonfarm Payrolls, challenging the 275bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage. The options market aligns with this downside risk as USD/JPY 25d RR shows a moderate put skew of -1.24, while GBP/USD leads G10 performance (+0.791% 1W avg) on a neutral carry spread. Cross-asset risk remains contained with gold lower -0.09%; equities -0.22%; DXY -0.37%; VIX 16.8. Watch US Nonfarm Payrolls at 12:30 UTC for the next major directional catalyst.
